texto: If we could push ajar the gates of life,And stand within, and all God's workings see,We could interpret all this doubt and strife,And for each mystery could find a key.But not today. Then be content, poor heart!God's plans, like lilies pure and white, unfold:We must not tear the close-shut leaves apart--Time will reveal the calyxes of gold.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Riley Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “If we could push ajar the gates of life,And stand within, and all God's workings see,We could int…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, future-plans, purpose pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e purpose.
